args.query: SELECT oi.Id, oi.OrderId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name, p.Description FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product2 p ON TRIM(REPLACE(oi.Product2Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(p.Id, '#', '')) WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '')) IN ('801Wt00000PGXwDIAX', '801Wt00000PHRYWIA5')

args.code:
import pandas as pd

# The user asks for the "AI processing unit" purchased "last month".
# Today's date: 2021-07-15
# Last month: June 2021.
# The order from June 2021 is 801Wt00000PHRYWIA5 (EffectiveDate: 2021-06-15).

data = env['data_5']
df = pd.DataFrame(data)

# Filter for the order from last month
df_last_month = df[df['OrderId'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip() == '801Wt00000PHRYWIA5']

# Look for AI processing unit
print(df_last_month[['Product2Id', 'Name', 'Description']])
